results.title: Anand Sudha Pauldurai
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Ecolab
...
Senior Data Scientist at [Ecolab Digital Center](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ecolab-digital-center)
...
Hello! I’m a Senior Data Scientist at Ecolab with 8 years of experience in Data Science and expertise in Agentic AI, Generative AI, Machine Learning, Azure Databricks, Power BI, and SQL. I’ve recently upskilled in Asset Bundle Deployment and CI/CD for Azure DevOps to Databricks (MLOps), along with advanced Agentic AI workflows. My journey into data science began with a strong analytical foundation as a Data Analyst at Wizidigital Marketing (2017–2022), where I worked extensively with Power BI, SQL Server, SSIS, SSAS, and SSRS to deliver actionable insights and support data-driven decision-making. In 2022, I completed an intensive Post Graduate Program in Data Science, sharpening my skills in Python and libraries like Pandas and Scikit-learn to build predictive models and extract insights. Over time, I’ve expanded my expertise to include Gen AI, Git implementation in Azure DevOps, streamlining collaboration and version control for my team. Data visualization is one of my core strengths—I leverage Power BI to communicate insights that drive strategic decisions. Currently, I’m advancing my knowledge in Generative AI and Agentic AI, preparing to integrate these emerging technologies into impactful solutions. My diverse background, including experience in logistics and digital marketing, gives me a unique perspective on data-driven strategies and business impact. I’m passionate about using data to create transformative solutions and enable smarter decision-making. Let’s connect and explore the future of data and AI together!
...

results.title: Shreya Dalmia
highlights:
Data Scientist · Applied AI & Generative AI · Predictive Modelling, Forecasting & Commercial Analytics · Ecolab Hackathon Winner 2025
...
Data Scientist at [Ecolab](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ecolab)
...
I build ML and AI systems that show up on the P&L — $2M revenue uplift, $10M cost savings, 28% acquisition gain, and a 1st-place win at Ecolab's Internal Innovation Hackathon (2025). Over 4 years at Ecolab Global, I've shipped production models across Food & Beverage, Healthcare, Hospitality, and Manufacturing — from demand forecasting and customer segmentation to LLM-powered workflows and predictive maintenance. What I am good at: 🔹 Predictive Modelling — classification, regression, recommendation & next-best-action systems 🔹 Time-Series & Multi-Horizon Forecasting — ARIMA / SARIMA, LightGBM, demand & spatio-temporal forecasting 🔹 Clustering & Segmentation — K-Means, hierarchical, embedding-based cohorts 🔹 Causal Inference & Experimentation — A/B testing, hypothesis testing 🔹 Applied AI / Generative AI — LLM fine-tuning, RAG, multi-agent workflows (GPT-4, LLaMA, DBRX, BERT) 🔹 Anomaly Detection & Predictive Maintenance Currently building a spatio-temporal demand forecasting pipeline on 9 years of grid-level data — methodology directly applicable to consumption and supply forecasting at scale. Tech stack: Python, PySpark, SQL, Databricks, Azure, Snowflake, Power BI, MLflow, Spark, REST APIs, modern LLM stacks.

results.title: How Ecolab rebuilt retail intelligence on Databricks and Anthropic Claude | Databricks Blog
highlights:
How Ecolab rebuilt retail intelligence on Databricks and Anthropic Claude | Databricks Blog
...
Ecolab uses Anthropic's Claude Sonnet and Haiku on Databricks Foundation Model APIs to convert 700-page FDA food safety manuals into cited, real-time answers for frontline retail staff. Built as a native Databricks App with Lakebase Postgres and Unity Catalog, the solution unifies nine siloed data sources and cuts compliance report compilation from two weeks to under two minutes. A multi-agent orchestration framework with dual-layer memory delivers personalized intelligence, continuously refined by five Judge LLMs and MLflow tracing.
...
Databricks gives Ecolab a single platform for data, AI, and governance without needing any separate ML infrastructure to stand up or manage. Through Foundation Model APIs, Ecolab serves Claude Sonnet for complex reasoning, Haiku for fast and cost-effective summarization, and Gemini for image analysis, all from the same control plane. If a better model emerges tomorrow, they swap it in without re-architecting. Every model call stays inside the Databricks security perimeter. The Unity AI Gateway layers on payload logging, per-user rate limiting, PII guardrails, and automatic fallbacks, while Unity Catalog governs access to both the data and the models serving it.
...
At the core of this framework is Anthropic's Claude, served through those same Foundation Model APIs.
...
Claude Sonnet acts as the primary reasoning engine, distilling complex regulations and maintaining long-term user memory. Claude Haiku handles summarization, condensing conversation history every three turns and distilling verbose data signals into concise briefs while keeping interactions fast and cost-effective.
...
Ecolab chose Claude after evaluating multiple providers. The model's response format proved best suited to compliance summarization, and their privately hosted Claude tenant met strict security requirements. At the same time, the Databricks platform gives them multi-model flexibility.
...
Short-term (working memory). Every query carries the last ten conversation turns directly in
...
prompt, the canonical conversation buffer approach. To keep
...
session grows, Claude
...
inline summarizer
...
turns, collapsing earlier exchanges into a dense digest. Prompt
...
keeps the warm context efficient on the
...
active state and persistent state
...
Quality is never static. Five Judge LLMs evaluate every interaction across multiple dimensions. User feedback combines with implicit signals to feed an automated prompt optimization loop. MLflow traces every execution path, while dashboards track latency and error rates in real time. The team even mines query logs to build better default questions based on what managers actually ask.
...
Real-time agent answers are only one half of the story. For high-volume offline workloads — retroactively scoring historical inspections, generating portfolio-wide compliance briefs, and powering the Judge LLM evaluation loop, Ecolab uses Databricks AI batch inference functions like ai_query() to apply Claude across thousands of records in a single SQL call. What used to be sequential row-by-row processing now completes in parallel in seconds, governed by the same Unity Catalog policies that guard the live agent.
...
> "What used to take two weeks, pulling data from nine systems to compile a single compliance report, now takes under two minutes with Claude on Databricks. Our frontline staff across 600 locations get cited, plain-language answers from a 700-page FDA food code in seconds, in whatever language they're most comfortable with." —Josh McCoy, Product Manager for Retail Intelligence, Ecolab
...
Next, Ecolab plans to add MCP-powered automated actions — pest inspections,chemical reorders, food safety norms and work orders triggered directly from the chat interface —turning the system from an intelligence layer into a full operational Agent.

# Sr. Data Scientist - Agentic AI (Minneapolis preferred, remote eligible)
...
To make the food people love, we need to make sure we feed our decision makers the right data and solutions at the right time, every time. As a Senior Data Scientist at General Mills, you will apply your strong expertise in machine learning, data mining, and information retrieval to design, prototype, and build next-generation advanced analytics engines and services. You will collaborate with product owners, business partners, and other Data Scientists to define the technical problem statement and the hypothesis to test. In addition, you will develop

efficient and
...
analytical models that mimic business decisions.
...
- Design & implementation of LLM-based agentic AI solutions for semi-structured data, covering problem framing, data curation, and evaluation across classification, entity extraction & summarization.
...
- Develop high‑quality Agentic AI and RAG workflows, optimizing ingestion, chunking, embeddings, and vector indexing with established frameworks and stores to maximize retrieval performance.
...
- Quickly learn and iterate with novel technologies/procedures, particularly but not exclusively around generative AI.
...
- Implement appropriate generative AI techniques and technologies to solve business problems, including prompt and LLM fine-tuning, RAG, agentic workflows, and tool designs.
...
- Bachelor’s degree in data science, Computer Science, Engineering, Math, Statistics or other related fields
...
- 6+ years of relevant experience with at least 2 years of relevant experience in Data Science.

programming principles.

...

...
- Experience developing and deploying Python packages and managing large-scale projects
- Experience developing/deploying generative AI technology, including agents, RAG, or similar.
- Experience with Google Cloud Platform or similar technology.
- Applied experience in consumer goods/supply chain
- Master’s degree in data science, Computer Science, Engineering, Math, or Statistics preferred.

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote)
...
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity)
...
Department: Data Science
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. This list is continuously evolving, so please check back with us if the state you live in is on the exclusion list. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform
...
Posted Jun
...
3, 2
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- A Typical Day:
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Inference: Partner with inference data scientists to conduct rigorous quantitative analyses, applying working knowledge of causal inference to interpret results, assess impact, and identify gaps and opportunities to improve content quality and trust outcomes.
...
Empowerment: Think strategically about how to scale and evolve Airbnb
...
s content integrity defenses
...
define the long
...

...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
